# Basemint

> Mint on Base. Create coins and NFTs on Base in seconds.

Basemint is a Farcaster-friendly mini app for launching ERC-20 tokens (via Zora Coins) and NFT editions on the Base network.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Trending coins and NFTs on Base, plus quick links to launch.
- [Create](/create): Launch a coin or NFT collection on Base in seconds.
- [Vault](/vault): View your coins and collected NFTs on Base.
